name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: rule.id must match basename(file, '.yaml') per the §2.1 filename-id consistency rule
command: printf 'id: g-ts-999\ntype: problem\n' > g-ts-309.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-309.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'id: "g-ts-999" must match filename basename "g-ts-309"' err.txt && echo id_matches 1>&2
